notes: Initial seed baseline computed against the deterministic offline fallback (_demo_shadow_result with include_fallback=False). This is intentionally a low number: the offline path is a wiring test, not a real precision/recall measurement. Citation metrics start at 0.0 (advisory only) — the offline demo fallback produces rule-based justifications not verbatim note quotes. Bump to LLM-on numbers (target precision >= 0.65, recall >= 0.60) once the clinician advisor (Hire #1) finalises the golden set per manual §2.2 week 3.
